_doc: V7 roster: 5 distinct creatures, one per design language (奶团/克劳德/方头崽/企鹅/墩墩熊). Single source of truth for the art engine (scripts/gen-art.mjs) AND the backend (web/src/lib/game/evolve.ts). A pet is bonded to a creature (= one of these keys, also its quiz archetype). The 3 GATED care actions steer the TEEN fork (play/pet stay free + decoupled from growth): feed→丰裕 branch, 洗澡/梳理(clean)→敏捷 branch, 看医生(doctor)→守护 branch, balanced→its own true form. species_id is the key for the true form, or `<key>__<variant>` for a branch.

puff.name: 奶团
puff.trueBlurb: 软乎乎的小团子，黏着你最幸福

feed.name: 圆奶团
feed.blurb: 越喂越圆滚，顶上还结了颗小樱桃

engage.name: 兔耳团
engage.blurb: 勤梳洗，冒出一对软软的兔耳朵

tend.name: 独角团
tend.blurb: 悉心照料，长出一只小独角

claude.name: 克劳德
claude.trueBlurb: 好奇又淡定的小家伙，爱捣鼓爱做事

feed.name: 饱墩克
feed.blurb: 喂成圆滚滚的方墩，懒洋洋的

engage.name: 卷须克
engage.blurb: 常打理，头顶翘起一根灵动卷须

tend.name: 团耳克
tend.blurb: 细心照护，冒出一对圆圆的小耳朵

blocky.name: 方头崽
blocky.trueBlurb: 复古方头方脑，话不多、冷面金句

feed.name: 胖方崽
feed.blurb: 喂得方圆方圆，肚子鼓鼓

engage.name: 天线崽
engage.blurb: 常打理，顶出一根复古小天线

tend.name: 飞翅崽
tend.blurb: 照护出一对方块小翅膀

penguin.name: 波波企鹅
penguin.trueBlurb: 高冷优雅的圆企鹅，慢条斯理

engage.name: 呆毛企鹅
engage.blurb: 常梳洗，翘起一撮俏皮呆毛

tend.name: 绒球企鹅
tend.blurb: 照护成毛茸茸的绒球宝宝

bear.name: 墩墩熊
bear.trueBlurb: 黑乎乎大红脸蛋，大大咧咧傻乐

engage.name: 圆耳熊
engage.blurb: 常打理，长出一对大圆耳

tend.name: 呆毛熊
tend.blurb: 照护出一根翘翘的呆毛
